description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black receiver and barrel, complemented by tan polymer furniture including the stock and pistol grip. The rifle features a collapsible stock, allowing for adjustable length to suit different users or scenarios. Its handguard is ribbed for improved grip, and the magazine is a detachable box type, slightly curved and also black. The front sight is a fixed triangular post, while the rear sight is integrated into the carry handle, both typical of AR-15 or M4-style rifles. The muzzle is fitted with a standard flash hider, and the overall design suggests a lightweight, modular firearm suitable for urban environments. The combination of metal and polymer materials gives it a robust yet ergonomic appearance.
description: A modern black rifle with tan collapsible stock and grip, detachable box magazine, and standard iron sights with a flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan collapsible stock, pistol grip, ribbed handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle with flash hider and the narrow profile of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tan stock and grip, magazine, and the carry handle with rear sight.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tan collapsible stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
